articles.title: Huawei MatePad Pro Max design, key features revealed ahead of launch
articles.description: Huawei has teased the design and key features of the MatePad Pro Max ahead of its launch tomorrow. The tablet will be unveiled alongside several other products at a global launch event in Bangkok. In a teaser video shared on its social media channels, Huawei confirmed that the MatePad Pro Max will be the slimmest model in the MatePad lineup, measuring just 4.7mm thick. The tablet is set to feature a 13.2-inch OLED PaperMatte display with a 3K resolution and ultra-slim 3.55mm bezels. It will also offer a new luminous finish and a dual rear camera setup. articles.description: Kyle Loftis, founder of 1320Video, died Tuesday night, leaving behind one of the biggest brands in online motorsports media. Reports estimate 1320Video’s value in the millions through YouTube ads, merchandise, sponsorships, and racing events. Fans continue to remember Loftis for helping underground racing culture reach millions of viewers around the world.

The update carries the build number CP1A.260505.005 and includes the latest May Android security patch. articles.title: Owning an Apple Home: HomePods as a whole-home audio system
articles.description: Apple's HomePod and HomePod mini are incredible additions to your smart home. Here's how I've made use of Apple's smart speaker after abandoning Sonos and other speakers. Whole-home audio is easier when you're all-in on a single ecosystem We're approaching two months in our new home, and I'm finally feeling like we've settled in nicely. If you missed my first installment on this Owning an Apple Home series, check it out to see how I approached the move and setup process. While I'm working on stories involving pet care, smart kitchens, MagSafe mounts, and more, I'd like to examine what it is to be all-in on HomePods. That's right, I don't have any third-party speaker or other AirPlay solution in my home. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Samsung officially releases One UI 8.5 for the Galaxy S25 and S24 series
articles.description: It's taken quite a while, but the beta program is finished and starting today, Samsung is rolling out the update to One UI 8.5 for the Galaxy S25 series, the Galaxy S24 family, the Galaxy Z Fold7, Flip7, Fold6, Flip6, Galaxy Tab S11 line, and Galaxy Tab S10 models. The rollout is starting in Korea today, with additional regions to get it in the next few days and weeks if no issues are found in the meantime. Samsung has been beta testing One UI 8.5 on its older high-end devices since December. The Galaxy S26, S26+, and S26 Ultra all launched running One UI 8.5, so it's good to...

articles.title: Hundreds of jobs cut at Coinbase as AI takes on more...
articles.description: Coinbase is laying off 14% of its workforce, around 700 employees, as it streamlines operations and embraces artificial intelligence. The crypto giant is simplifying its structure, reducing management layers, and forming smaller, agile teams powered by AI to boost efficiency and speed up decision-making in a volatile market. This strategic shift aims to enhance output per employee.

articles.title: Europe’s only nuclear-powered aircraft carrier heads to Red Sea: All about France's Charles de Gaulle
articles.description: France's flagship aircraft carrier, the Charles de Gaulle, is heading to the southern Red Sea, signaling readiness for a potential mission to secure navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. This preparatory move allows for an assessment of the operational environment, aiming to reduce response time for a multinational coalition focused on freedom of navigation.

articles.title: Smartphone market led by Apple's iPhone in post-holiday sales
articles.description: The iPhone outpaced its rivals in the first quarter of 2026, with Counterpoint deeming it the first time that Apple has led the smartphone market in the post-holiday quarter. iPhone led the global smartphone market in Q1 2026 Apple's success in the smartphone market for the first quarter spanned multiple areas, including improvements in growth and shipments of the iPhone outpacing its rivals. Apple's stellar Q2 2026 financial results included a revenue bump from the iPhone, among other factors. In a report from analysts at Counterpoint looking at the quarter in general, Apple saw success in a number of different ways. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

Sadly, a pretty high number of Teslas are at danger of failing on that simple task. The National ​Highway Traffic Safety Administration ...

articles.title: BOE just can't make good enough iPhone screens in volume
articles.description: China's BOE has taken another hit with Apple reportedly choosing not to use it for the OLED displays on the forthcoming iPhone 18 Pro . Render of a possible iPhone 18 Pro - image credit: AppleInsider For years now , BOE has been making large-scale investment in display manufacturing in order to gain iPhone orders from Apple. It even managed to supply some screens for the iPhone 17 Pro , but according to The Elec , Apple is going with Samsung Display and LG Display for at least most of its next OLED models. Citing unspecified sources within the supply chain, the report claims that Apple will make its final choice of suppliers before the end of May 2026. BOE is said to lag behind both of its main rivals in terms of production quality and manufacturing yield. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Redmi Watch 6 goes global with huge 2-inch screen, 24-day battery life
articles.description: The Redmi Watch 6 was initially announced in China in November, and now it's finally starting to make it to other markets, as it's been listed by Xiaomi's global website. The Redmi Watch 6 comes in two versions, one with NFC, one without. The watch has a 2.07" AMOLED screen with 432x514 resolution, 60Hz refresh rate, and 2,000-nit peak brightness. The device measures 46.45 x 40.03 x 9.94 mm and weighs 31g without a strap. It's offered in Obsidian Black, Silver Gray, and Glacier Blue. It packs the obligatory heart rate sensor with support for monitoring blood oxygen, an...

articles.description: Samsung Galaxy A27 5G has allegedly appeared on the Geekbench benchmarking site again. The listing for the phone tells us about some of its key specifications. It is expected to run on the Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset. It runs on Android 16 and features 5.23GB of RAM. The Galaxy A27 5G is expected to feature a 6.7-Inch display and a triple rear camera unit.

articles.title: Is Alphabet overtaking Nvidia? The AI chip king's reign is under threat
articles.description: Alphabet is closing in on Nvidia's position as the world's most valuable company. Strong growth in Alphabet's cloud and AI businesses is driving this shift. The company is also developing its own AI chips, challenging Nvidia's dominance. Investors are watching this evolving competition closely as Big Tech invests heavily in AI infrastructure.

articles.title: UPSC NDA 1 result 2026 expected to be released soon: Check steps to download scorecards
articles.description: The Union Public Service Commission is expected to release the NDA and NA (I) 2026 results soon, likely on May 6. The written exam was held on April 12 nationwide. Qualified candidates will be shortlisted via a roll number list and move to the SSB interview stage, which evaluates personality and intelligence over multiple days.

articles.title: Meta rolls out AI face-scanning tool to verify teen ages on Facebook and Instagram
articles.description: Meta is rolling out a new AI system that analyses users’ faces to estimate age on Facebook and Instagram, aiming to strengthen protections for teenagers. The move comes amid growing regulatory pressure worldwide, but it also raises fresh concerns about accuracy, privacy, and how far platforms should go in policing users.

articles.title: Lorazzo Redefines Modern Living with Smart, Design-Led Kitchen and Bathroom Products
articles.description: New Delhi [India], May 6: Lorazzo, a fast-emerging direct-to-consumer home improvement brand, is transforming everyday living with its innovative range of kitchen and bathroom products designed specifically for modern Indian homes. Founded in 2024, the company is rapidly gaining attention for blending smart design, durability, and affordability in a category traditionally dominated by either low-cost generic products and non-aspirational brands or expensive global players.

articles.title: Google's 'The Android Show I/O Edition' is back for a second year
articles.description: Google has officially confirmed that The Android Show will return for a second year, with the event scheduled to take place next week ahead of Google I/O 2026, which kicks off on May 19. In a video shared on social media, Google announced that this year’s Android Show I/O Edition is set to take place on May 12. You’ll be able to watch the pre-recorded event on YouTube. You won’t believe what’s next for Android! Tune in to the The Android Show | I/O Edition May 12 at 10 am PT for a look at the future. Set a reminder at https://t.co/RFgly7WP7M and be the first to know 🗓️ #TheAndroidShow...
